name: Lemon Beef Oriental
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sirloin Butt Steak (cut into bite-sized pieces)
1 lb Fresh snow peas (Chinese pea pods, sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil with salt in a wok or heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Stir-fry steak pieces until browned.
3. Sprinkle with lemon peel and add broth, peas, and mushrooms. Stir-fry for 1 minute longer.
4. Combine lemon juice with cornstarch. Add to beef and cook until thickened and bubbly.
5. Stir in ginger. Serve with hot, cooked rice. (4-5 servings)
